title: New episode with Tim Holtz!
excerpt: This is the fifth episode of Design On Time , and we are featuring the amazing Tim Holtz , who has challenged us with some interesting items! We were so excited about his enthusiasm and encouragement when we asked him…
body:
This is the fifth episode of Design On Time, and we are featuring the amazing Tim Holtz, who has challenged us with some interesting items! We were so excited about his enthusiasm and encouragement when we asked him to be our guest challenger. And then we were both a little stumped about what to do with the rubber bands and junk mail, but loved incorporating it with his famous Distress Ink! Who knew that this trio would baffle us so?! Here's the video.

Once again, I think Jamie's layout turned out way better than mine. I'm really impressed with how she used the rubber bands. I think it would be awesome to do an entire background with smaller ones and different colored mists! We even talked about how cool it would be to incorporate those little colorful rubber bands that seem to be really popular right now.

In case you missed it - Design On Time : episode 1 | episode 2 | episode 3 | episode 4

Supplies: Messy Box by A Beautiful Mess | Crate Paper stickers | Tim Holtz Distress Inks - whole collection and my favorite starter kit | Amy Tangerine products | All Ready Memories Distress Palette Organizer - 25% off your entire purchase through April 30 using code AMYTAN25 at All Ready Memories 

Thanks again for tuning in! If Design On Time has inspired you to make something this week, please share your work with us using the hashtag #designontime. We've enjoyed seeing a few creations inspired by the show.
